en.name: Level 79 — Ghosts in the Machine
en.shortDescription: An abandoned mid-20th-century medical research facility racked by time anomalies, bearing traces of unethical experiments on children.
en.atmosphere: A decrepit clinic of ominous machinery where temporal distortion makes you feel like you're phasing through reality itself.
en.tips: Don't linger — the entrance relocates unpredictably, and a 16-clock machine triggers spatial-displacement tremors every 30 minutes.
